title: Service ClusterIP allocation — Example 3
text:
This example uses the IP address range: 10.96.0.0/16 (CIDR notation) for the IP addresses
of Services.
Range Size: 2
16
- 2 = 65534
Band Offset:
min(max(16, 65536/16), 256)
=
min(4096, 256)
= 256
Static band start: 10.96.0.1
Static band ends: 10.96.1.0
Range end: 10.96.255.254
pie showData
    title 10.96.0.0/16
    "Static" : 256
    "Dynamic" : 65278
